description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.6 Docker image. Add a single job named pages (running in the default stage) that only runs when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME equals $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH. In its script, first execute `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -qq nodejs`, then `bundle install -j4`, then `bundle exec rake generate`, then `mv public .public` and finally `mv .public/octopress public`. Publish the resulting `public/` directory as a pages artifact.
